MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Carolyn Doten, 415-794-7798 Plaintiff in pro Per.
Sean Broderick, Esq. 415-278-1415 of Davis Wang for Defendant MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA XXXIV, LLP, MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares his thoughts with the parties. Plaintiff argues and informs the Court of the Police Report. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA XXXIV, LLP, MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication.

Defendants Mercy Housing California XXXIV, LLP and Mercy Housing Management Group's motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendants present competent evidence showing that they did not have actual or constructive notice of Ms. Bush's violent propensities and defendants did not breach any sort of duty that they owed to plaintiff as a tenant. (Cochico Dec., pars. 11 - 17.) In opposition, plaintiff fails to create a triable issue of material fact regarding the claims asserted against defendants. There is no evidence showing that defendants: 1) had notice of Ms. Bush's violent propensities; 2) are vicariously liable for Ms. Bush's conduct, or 3) committed a wrong against plaintiff. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details) Defendant to submit a proposed Judgment in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
